Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FiEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Do 'VisualizarComboEmpresa' Do 'CountImpressaoPendente' &Count.ForeColor= RGB(255,69,0) txt_imppendentes.ForeColor = RGB(255, 69,0) txtExistem.ForeColor = RGB(255, 69,0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &FIsts = nullvalue(&FIsts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Fila Impressao' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount FIsts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FiUsuCod.Clear() Do 'CountImpressaoPendente' Do 'loadCombo' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Display = !'' &Display.Link = VisualizarDadosImpressao.Link(FIempCod, FIcod) Do Case Case FIsts.ToString().Trim() = 'P' FIsts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case FIsts.ToString().Trim() = 'F' FIsts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case FIsts.ToString().Trim() = 'C' FIsts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise FIsts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxFiEmpCod = FIempCod &AuxFiUsuCod = FiUsuCod Do 'loadPessoa' EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ FilaImpressao.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(FIempCod), nullvalue(FIcod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWFilaImpressao.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWFilaImpressao.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaEms1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaIni1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaFim1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaEms1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAINI' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaIni1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAFIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaFim1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaEms2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaIni2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaFim2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaEms2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAINI' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaIni2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAFIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaFim2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaEms3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaIni3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaFim3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaEms3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAINI' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaIni3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAFIM' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFiDtaFim3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAEMS' &FiDtaEms2.SetEmpty() &FiDtaEms_To2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAEMS' &FiDtaEms3.SetEmpty() &FiDtaEms_To3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FIUSUCOD" &FiUsuCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FIEMPCOD" &FIempCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FISTS" &FIsts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAEMS' &FiDtaEms1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FiDtaEms_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAINI' &FiDtaIni1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FiDtaIni_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAFIM' &FiDtaFim1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FiDtaFim_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FIUSUCOD", "", not &FiUsuCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FiUsuCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FIEMPCOD", "", not &FIempCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FIempCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FISTS", "", not &FIsts.IsEmpty(), 0, &FIsts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAEMS' AND not (&FiDtaEms1.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaEms_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaEms1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaEms_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAINI' AND not (&FiDtaIni1.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaIni_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaIni1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaIni_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FIDTAFIM' AND not (&FiDtaFim1.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaFim_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaFim1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaFim_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAEMS' AND not (&FiDtaEms2.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaEms_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaEms2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaEms_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAINI' AND not (&FiDtaIni2.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaIni_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaIni2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaIni_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FIDTAFIM' AND not (&FiDtaFim2.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaFim_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaFim2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaFim_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAEMS' AND not (&FiDtaEms3.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaEms_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaEms3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaEms_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAINI' AND not (&FiDtaIni3.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaIni_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaIni3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaIni_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FIDTAFIM' AND not (&FiDtaFim3.IsEmpty() AND &FiDtaFim_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FiDtaFim3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FiDtaFim_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"FilaImpressao" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event CancelarPendentes.Click if &Count >= 1 prcCancelarImpressaoPendente.Call(&FIempCod, &CountCancelados) Refresh msg(&CountCancelados.ToString() + ' Impressões foram canceladas.') else msg('Não há enhuma impressão pendente para cancelar.') EndIf EndEvent Sub 'VisualizarComboEmpresa' if &Context.Old_Perfil <> 3 //suportes &FIempCod.Visible = false EndIf EndSub Sub 'CountImpressaoPendente' &Count.SetEmpty() For each order FIempCod, FIsts , FIcod where FIempCod = &FiEmpCod //oq tiver no DynamicComboBox where FIsts = 'P' &Count += 1 EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadCombo' &FiUsuCod.AddItem(0, 'TODOS') &FiUsuCod.AddItem(-1, 'SISTEMA') &AuxFiEmpCod.SetEmpty() &AuxFiUsuCod.SetEmpty() For each order EmpCod, PesIsFun, PesCod where EmpCod = &FiEmpCod //a empresa que tiver no dynamic Combo &EmpCod where PesIsFun = true where PesExtCod > 0 &PesCod = PesCod &PesCodRaz = PesCodRaz Do 'montaCombo' EndFor EndSub Sub 'montaCombo' &FiUsuCod.AddItem(&PesCod, &PesCodRaz) EndSub Sub 'loadPessoa' Do case case &AuxFiUsuCod < -1000 &PesCodRaz = 'CONTADOR' case &AuxFiUsuCod < 0 &PesCodRaz = 'SUPORTE' case &AuxFiUsuCod = 0 &PesCodRaz = 'NÃO DEFINIDO' otherwise For each order EmpCod, PesCod where EmpCod = &AuxFiEmpCod where PesCod = &AuxFiUsuCod &PesCod = PesCod &PesCodRaz = PesCodRaz exit EndFor EndCase EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
